items.name_en: 5NR461, New Mini Lucky Bag, made of imported vintage soft sheepskin, vintage distressed hardware, full of premium feel. The design is unique, with smooth lines. Whether for daily street wear or important occasions, it will make you stand out.

Authentic Grade
5BC125: MiuMiu New MiuWander Bag, featuring imported lambskin with classic brand signature Matelasse texture embroidery, vintage matte hardware. Utilizing curved lines, it retains a playful feel. The bag shape is structured and stylish, full of personality, sweet yet chic. It has ample capacity. Major fashion bloggers almost all own one. Available in many colors: Black, Milky White, Peacock Blue, Sunlight Yellow, Cherry Blossom Pink, Big Red, etc. Size: 23X13X7. Comes with original packaging.

5BB168, Miu Miu's new best-selling bowling bag, made with top-tier vintage soft sheepskin. Vintage matte-finish aged metal hardware. This Aventure Nappa leather tote is inspired by Miu Miu's classic pieces. The structure has been adjusted to be lighter and exudes a new personality, creating a classic bag with timeless charm. Multi-element design gives this tote unique beauty and a classic feel. Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, canvas lining with zip pocket and patch pocket. Dimensions: 33X17 X 11cm

items.name_en: Authentic-grade Reproduction Miu Miu 5BB117: New Miu Miu canvas briefcase, perfect fusion of fashion and classic, the next big hit is definitely this one. Canvas fabric paired with calfskin, soft and durable texture. Lighter and more versatile than the full leather version. Stunning in both appearance and practicality. Third-generation long handle design for shoulder carrying. Large size with ample capacity, easily holding various essentials. Perfect choice for work or travel. New canvas lining is more beautiful and durable. Size: 34X23X12cm (with original packaging)

For the color dilemma 👀 MIUMIU Vivant

Caramel Suede or Cognac Calfskin
